test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns 200 OK.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with missing name returns 422.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with born_year out of range returns 422.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with default pagination works.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_custom_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing authors with custom skip and limit works.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing author returns 200.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that conditional GET with matching ETag returns 304.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with valid data works.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with mismatched ETag returns 412.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author without books returns 204.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with books returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new category can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns 409.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with invalid ISBN returns 422.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_default_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with default pagination works.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that listing books with filters (author_id, category_id) works.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving an existing book returns 200.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a book with valid data works.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that soft-deleting a book returns 204.

test_cases.name: delete_already_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a soft-deleted book returns 200.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to an eligible book works.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a new book returns 400.
